name: Customer-outbound full engagement (SUEZ-shaped)
notes: Modeled on eng_2026_suez_webuy (90-day procure-to-pay; full discipline mix; MSA+SoW with milestone billing). Promotion to active gated on first instance ratification per SOP-ENGAGEMENT_TEMPLATE_PROMOTION_001.md (P3 deliverable).

name: Partner-outbound cobranding + maintenance (EFA-shaped)
notes: Modeled on eng_2026_efa_collab (cobranding + maintenance overlap; 6-month rolling renewal; quarterly billing). Storytelling discipline marketed as ad-hoc (not always-on for partner-cobrand templates).

name: Collaborator-inbound technical advisory (ShadowGPU-shaped)
notes: Modeled on eng_2026_shadowgpu_inbound (English-only working language; DPA-only contract; no external billing). Tech/System Owner is the discipline-of-record; PMO orchestrates milestones; Compliance covers the DPA cycle.

name: Sister-business outbound GTM (Asesoria Hosteleria-shaped)
notes: Modeled on eng_2026_asesoria_hosteleria (Spanish primary working language; French secondary; sister-business GTM with no external contract; internal accounting only). Round-trip discipline mix matches customer-outbound but with internal contract.

name: Internal Service Management SSOT (SMO-shaped)
notes: Modeled on eng_2026_internal_service_management_ssot (no external counterparty; SMO charter as deliverable; activated alongside I70 P8). Use for any internal-canonical-authoring engagement.

name: Partner-outbound short pilot (Websitz-shaped; archive-after)
notes: Modeled on eng_2026_websitz_use_case_2_rushly (kick-off + triage + 1-2 month execution; archived after if no extension). Use for short partner pilots with explicit archive-after planning.
